problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
mechanism: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins
hypothesis: If Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins is applied to spread, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
